Cinema: Completing a Projecthttps://<lindsay-kislingbury>.github.io/post/cinema-3/Sat, 12 Nov 2022 21:47:41 +0000https://<lindsay-kislingbury>.github.io/post/cinema-3/I decided on a fuzzy search of the database for matching movies and needed to send the results to the front end in a way that was easy to access.
